headline: Agent orchestration tooling led the month as model routing and subagents climbed while a cluster of generative techniques broke out.
body: Model routing and subagents topped the movers, with engineers shifting from manual prompting toward orchestrated agent loops that spawn parallel workers under database observability, and toward packaged coding agents like Z AI's Z Code for GLM-5.2 and Claude Cowork workflow automation. On the technique side, flow matching held the lead while quantization, encoder-decoder, and Rectified Flow all broke out, and a sandboxing cluster (double iframe, CSP, sandbox, srcdoc) entered as new. Talent and infrastructure moves framed the window: Noam Shazeer joined OpenAI, Meta's head of product for AI at work departed, and an x86 AI Compute Extensions specification surfaced alongside sovereign full-stack ownership arguments.

cited_items.title: FULLY FREE GLM-5.2 + Z-Code: This is ACTUALLY GOOD!
6 INSANE Claude Cowork Use Cases to Save Hours (AI Workflow Automation)
Sovereign AI: Why Owning the Full Stack Is the New Strategic Imperative
